missions.title: Mastery Module 1: Ideal gas equation and Related Concepts
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering ideal gas equation, assumptions of kinetic theory, pressure of an ideal gas and advanced applications.

microtargets.title: Ideal gas equation
ncertAnchors: NCERT Physics Class 11, Chapter: Kinetic Theory of Gases, Section detailing Ideal gas equation
mustKnowFacts: A thorough understanding of Ideal gas equation is frequently appears in NEET examinations.
Applying the core principles of Ideal gas equation correctly is essential for solving integrated numerical and conceptual problems in Kinetic Theory of Gases.
commonTraps: Misinterpreting the advanced application scenarios of Ideal gas equation during high-pressure exam scenarios.
Failing to recall the exact conditions or sign conventions associated with Ideal gas equation.
masteryCriteria: Understands and can apply concepts of Ideal gas equation.
Successfully avoids common pitfalls when Ideal gas equation is integrated with other concepts in Kinetic Theory of Gases.
pyqPatterns: NEET PyQs emphasize the application of Ideal gas equation in tricky assertion-reason or statement-based questions.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain an application where using the concept of Ideal gas equation can lead to a common student error.
